CactusPhylo 0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference Manual
    • 1. Data Assembly & Preparation
    • 2. Inference & Dating
    • 3. Visualization & IUCN Summary
    • 4. Phylogenetic Validation
    • 5. Internal Functions Guide

Package index

Sequence Assemblies & PhylotaR Import

Functions to setup databases, pull taxonomic clusters, and download GenBank accessions safely.

assemble_ingroup_phylotar()
Assemble Ingroup phylotaR Clusters
assemble_outgroup_phylotar()
Assemble Outgroup phylotaR Clusters
fetch_genbank_metadata()
Fetch Genbank Metadata

Taxonomic Cleaning & Reconciliations

Check name spelling, audit duplicates, and verify records against checklists.

clean_taxonomic_names()
Reconcile and Validate Taxonomic Names
integrate_and_clean_markers()
Final Marker Integration and Taxonomic Cleaning

Multiple Alignment, DECIPHER Cleaners, & Masking

Run system MAFFT and refine aligned nucleotides using gap-masking procedures.

run_mafft()
Run MAFFT Alignment
run_alignment_pipeline()
Run Complete Alignment Pipeline
run_joint_realignment()
Run Final Joint Realignment Pipeline

Locus Quality Control & Saturation Screening

Detect distance outliers and perform saturation regression checks.

run_marker_screening()
Run Ingroup Marker Screening Pipeline

Concatenation and Partitioning Maps

Bind loci end-to-end to assemble a master phylogenetic matrix and export format partitions.

run_concatenation_pipeline()
Run Concatenation Pipeline

Phylogenetic Search & Constrained Inference

Run model testers (ModelTest-NG) and ML estimations (RAxML-NG) guided by Newick scaffolds.

preprocess_partitions()
Preprocess Partitions and Run Alignment Check
run_modeltest_ng()
Run ModelTest-NG Partition Evaluations
build_constraint_scaffold()
Generate Newick Constraint Scaffold
calculate_ml_tree()
Execute ML Search in RAxML-NG
calculate_rf_distances()
Compute Robinson-Foulds Distances between Maximum-Likelihood Trees
generate_bootstrap_script()
Generate Chunk Bootstrap Shell Script
run_local_bootstraps()
Run Bootstrap Search Locally
collect_bootstraps()
Collect Bootstrap Trees
check_bs_convergence()
Check Bootstrap Convergence
calculate_temporal_bootstraps()
Compute Temporal Best Maximum-Likelihood Tree Constrained Bootstrap Replicates
map_branch_supports()
Calculate and Burn Branch Supports

Chronological Dating & treePL Automation

Automated treePL cross-validation and chronological calibrations over bootstrap cohorts.

rescale_tree()
Rescale all branches of a tree
run_treePL()
Run treePL via Wrapper
run_treePL_direct()
Run treePL directly
automate_treePL()
Automate treePL bootstrap pipeline

Multi-Scale Topologies Validation

Compare comparative tree structures using Robinson-Foulds, DPI, and project into 2D MDS scopes.

validate_phylogenies()
Comparative Tree space validation pipeline

Manuscript Figures & Publication Polish

Integrate final results, apply editorial clade collapses, and draw SVG/PDF panels.

integrate_publication_tree()
Render Final Publication Figures and Registry

IUCN Conservation Metadata

Extract threat metrics and habitats using rredlist and map color scales for plotting.

get_iucn_data()
Extract IUCN Data from rredlist
scale_fill_iucn()
IUCN Category Color Scale for ggplot2

Internal Tools and Visualization Helpers

Internal functions for phylogenetic visualization and data preparation.

add_clade_labels_by_level()
Add clade labels by level
apply_clade_label_layers()
Apply clade label layers
assert_constraint_columns()
Assert constraint columns
augment_treedata_with_registry()
Augment treedata with registry annotations
build_annotation_registry()
Build annotation registry
compute_group_nodes()
Compute group nodes
get_annotation_nodes()
Get annotation nodes
prepare_tip_annotation()
Prepare tip annotation
standardize_taxon()
Standardization helper
get_tree_max_depth()
Get tree max depth
format_age_labels()
Format age labels
add_chronogram_axis()
Add chronogram axis
